name: termweave-app

scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run format:check
scripts.format: prettier --write --ignore-unknown src app.config.json package.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.js .prettierrc.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check --ignore-unknown src app.config.json package.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.js .prettierrc.json

description: A terminal desktop application built with Termweave.
